---
title: "Elizabeth Márquez Gómez"
image: "eli.png"
links:
  - label: Twitter
    url: 'https://twitter.com/MqElizabeth'
  - label: GitHub
    url: 'https://github.com/Elizabeth-mqz-gmz'
  - label: Email
    url: 'mailto:elimqzg@lcg.unam.mx'
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## About me

I am a 19-year-old student, studying the undergraduate of Genomic Sciences at National Autonomous University of Mexico (UNAM). I am interested on bioinformatics and the study of evolution. I am passionate about science, thrilled and intrigued by the unsolved mysteries in the area of biology and astrophysics. My biggest goal is to do research in the area of astrobiology, focusing on the study of the origin of life, existence and subsistence of life outside the Earth.
I enjoy setting new challenges and finding creative solutions to existing problems.

## Education

**Escuela Nacional Preparatoria No. 6 "Antonio Caso"** | Mexico City, MEX

Computer Technician | August 2017 - April 2019

**Centro de Ciencias Genómicas - Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México** | Morelos, MEX

Undergraduate Genomic Science student | August 2019 - Present

## Experience

**Escuela Nacional Preparatoria No. 6 "Antonio Caso"** | Web Development Course | May 2018 - June 2018

**Instituto de Fisiología Celular - UNAM** | Dra. Paula Licona | June 2018 - July 2018

**ARACT UNAM** | Robotics Course | August 2018

**Instituto Nacional de Pediatría - UNAM** | Dr. Juan Miranda | June 2019 - July 2019

**Instituto de Biotecnología - UNAM** | Dr. Mario Zurita | February 2020 - March 2020

**Astrobiology: Exploring Other Worlds** | University of Arizona | July 2020
